The massive, highly lucrative world of corporate telecommunications was aggressively shifting toward the deployment of highly advanced, broadband infrastructure. ## SECTION 3 — Global Economy & Business Shifts
The global financial markets ended the trading week in a state of absolute, massive hyper-anxiety. The European single currency continued to face severe, highly public growing pains on the global exchange markets. The Euro experienced a sustained, massive depreciation against the US Dollar. This massive corporate gamble was heavily predicated on the aggressive belief that future global air travel would rely entirely on massive, high-volume hub-to-hub routing.
